welcome.card.just.description: This platform was developed by a single person and actually in development.
welcome.card.about.title: About the author
welcome.card.about.description: Hi there! I am so happy to see u on my first huge web-project. I am a casual 3rd year student of National University ''Zaporizhzhia Polytechnic'', Zaporizhzhia, Ukraine. There is no modern web-development classes in my uni however, so I decided to do some self-education stuff.
welcome.card.explore.title: 🎵 Explore
welcome.card.explore.description: Explore the world of custom music, share, like and comment amazing audio posts.
welcome.card.anywhere.title: 🌐 Anywhere
welcome.card.anywhere.description: Anytime: Accessible on desktop, tablet, or mobile – fun knows no bounds.
welcome.card.community.title: 🤝 Community
welcome.card.community.description: Connect, collaborate, and be inspired by like-minded creators.
welcome.card.start.title: 🚀 Lets get started
welcome.card.start.description: Join ''Music from Nothing'' today and let the music begin!
